Brilliance v33.0 · Welcome Release

Mockups & Strategy

Live previews of the v33.0 surfaces and the strategy docs that drive them. Built overnight 2026-04-27 in auto mode while you slept. Click a mockup to see it live.

Live mockups

i.

Brilli, the entity

Working Canvas 2D prototype of Brilli the firefly. Six states (idle, attending, thinking, delivering, pleased, asleep). Three sizes (hero, inline, pin). Live FPS metrics. Reduced-motion aware.

Most important Interactive →

ii.

Welcome to Brilliance

First-launch announcement modal that fires once per existing user on next open after v33.0 deploys. Three copy variants you can switch between.

Variants A/B/C →

iii.

Launch screen

The new app boot/loading screen. Brilli at hero scale. Wordmark with gold gradient. Subtle background drift. Replaces the current splash.

Boot moment →

iv.

Sidebar rebrand

Before/after of the in-app sidebar. Same structure, same icons, new wordmark and footer credit. Brilli pulse status dot. Toggle collapsed/expanded.

Before/after →

v.

/info overhaul

Preview of /info reskinned to match Brilliance design language. New hero with wordmark. Meet Brilli section. Cross-mode intelligence story. Old Standard TT throughout.

Phase F →

Mobile previews

vi.

Mobile preview hub

All five surfaces inside iPhone-shaped frames, side by side. Open this first to see how the mobile experience hangs together. Live iframes; tap any frame's link to view the full mockup.

Start here for mobile →

vii.

Mobile launch screen

Dedicated mobile boot screen. Brilli at 200px. Wordmark scales via clamp. Loader pulse 32px above safe-area home indicator. Reduced-motion fallback in place.

iPhone tested →

viii.

Mobile liquid-nav

The mobile equivalent of the sidebar. 50px pill at the bottom with a Brilli status dot at the left edge. Top bar reads "Brilliance" with the existing app icon. Six tabs unchanged.

Sidebar surrogate →

Strategy docs

All written tonight. Living in docs/brilliance/ in the repo. Read in numerical order or jump to whichever is most useful.

  • 00.v33.0 Master Plandocs/brilliance/00-v33-master-plan.md
  • 01.Brilli Entity Specdocs/brilliance/01-brilli-entity.md
  • 02.Welcome to Brilliance Experiencedocs/brilliance/02-welcome-experience.md
  • 03.In-App Rename Plandocs/brilliance/03-in-app-rename.md
  • 04.Cleanup Targetsdocs/brilliance/04-cleanup-targets.md
  • 05.Brilli Animation Tech Specdocs/brilliance/05-brilli-animation.md
  • 06./info Overhaul Plandocs/brilliance/06-info-overhaul.md
  • 07.Investor Framework (deferred)docs/brilliance/07-investor-framework.md
  • 08.Mobile Design Specdocs/brilliance/08-mobile-design-spec.md
  • 09.Wakeup Summarydocs/brilliance/09-wakeup-summary.md

Brilliance · by RoweOS · v33.0 mockups · built 2026-04-27 overnight
